name: 01-intro
text: Introducing DeskCat. Your floating desktop companion.

name: 03-appearance
text: Upload any image to create a custom companion.

name: 04-resize
text: DeskCat renders the new pet instantly on your desktop.

name: 05-chat
text: Hover to open chat. Type, speak, or send an image.

name: 06-models
text: And connect DeskCat to your own model provider.

name: 07-states
text: Choose between a pet sprite and a live Orb. Both respond to idle, work, and rest.

name: 08-modes
text: Focus mode keeps DeskCat quiet when you need space. Coding mode mirrors Claude Code and Codex status.

name: 09-timeline
text: Timeline remembers the shape of your day. Including foreground windows, background activity, and terminal sessions, all in one calm view.

name: 10-finale
text: DeskCat. The tiny desktop companion that keeps up with your day. Open source on GitHub.
